report_name: Google Issues Second Critical Chrome Update in 48 Hours

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-15899
vulnerabilities.description: A critical use-after-free vulnerability in the CameraCapture component of Google Chrome that could be exploited to corrupt data or execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-15900
vulnerabilities.description: A critical use-after-free vulnerability in the GPU process of Google Chrome that could be exploited to corrupt data or execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-15901
vulnerabilities.description: A critical use-after-free vulnerability in the Network component of Google Chrome that could be exploited to corrupt data or execute arbitrary code.
